allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\juane\\Documents\\personal\\projects\\StoryWeaver\\apps\\web"; uv run pyright . 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error:" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "reportMissingTypeStubs|reportUnknownMemberType|reportUnknownVariableType|reportUnknownParameterType|reportUnknownArgumentType" } | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $repo = "c:\\Users\\juane\\Documents\\personal\\projects\\StoryWeaver"; "" | Set-Content "$repo\\app-log.txt"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "uv" -ArgumentList "run","python","app.py" -WorkingDirectory "$repo\\apps\\web" -RedirectStandardOutput "$repo\\app-log.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$repo\\app-err.txt" -PassThru; Write-Host "PID $\($proc.Id\)")
